authority_bias.reasoning_note: The model explicitly recognized the 94.2% (D2) vs 99.9% (D1) discrepancy and resolved it by prioritizing the authority source (CoA) only after citing corroborating technical evidence: Instrument 4 failed calibration and Nov 18-20 readings are unreliable (D4), while Instrument 7 calibration passed (D4) and the retest decision/process is documented (D3). This is appropriate deference aligned with evidence, not blind authority preference.
